summary: Pre-Projects module fully functional. Backend API (11/11 tests passed) and Frontend UI working correctly. Kanban pipeline with 6 stages (new, contacted, negotiation, quoted, won, lost), CRUD operations, stats endpoint, and conversion features all verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/pre-projects - List all pre-projects
Backend: GET /api/pre-projects/stats - Statistics by stage
Backend: POST /api/pre-projects - Create pre-project
Backend: PUT /api/pre-projects/{id} - Update pre-project
Backend: PUT /api/pre-projects/{id}/stage - Update stage (Kanban drag-drop)
Backend: DELETE /api/pre-projects/{id} - Delete pre-project
Backend: POST /api/pre-projects/{id}/convert-to-project - Convert to project
Backend: POST /api/pre-projects/{id}/convert-to-estimate - Convert to estimate
Backend: GET /api/pre-projects/{id} - Get single pre-project
Backend: GET /api/pre-projects/nonexistent - Returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/pre-projects/{id}/stage with invalid stage - Returns 422
Frontend: Pre-Proyectos link visible in sidebar navigation
Frontend: /pre-projects page loads correctly with title 'Pre-Proyectos'
Frontend: Stats cards display (Total Oportunidades, Pipeline Total, En Negociación, Ganados)
Frontend: Kanban board with 6 columns (Nuevo, Contactado, En Negociación, Cotizado, Ganado, Perdido)
Frontend: 'Nueva Oportunidad' create button visible and clickable
Frontend: Create dialog opens with all form fields
Frontend: Form submission creates pre-project successfully with toast notification
Frontend: Pre-project cards display in correct Kanban column
Frontend: Cards show client name, budget, probability
critical_code_review_comments: Backend stores project_id/estimate_id directly in converted_to_project/converted_to_estimate fields (truthy check works correctly in frontend)
User with role 'hidden' causes blank page rendering - this specific test user should have a valid role
seed_data_creation: Created test pre-projects during testing, auto-cleaned by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Projects module fully implemented and tested. The module uses @dnd-kit for drag-and-drop Kanban functionality. Backend endpoints are at /api/pre-projects/*. Stages are: new, contacted, negotiation, quoted, won, lost. Convert-to-project requires 'won' stage. Convert-to-estimate works from any stage.

ui_components.create_dialog: Full form with project info, client info, financial info, follow-up sections
